description_long: This is an open book with a brown cover and visible, slightly yellowed pages, suggesting age or frequent use. The book features several colored tabs or bookmarks protruding from the sides, including green, blue, red, and tan, which add visual interest and functionality for marking sections. The pages are unevenly stacked, giving the book a realistic, well-thumbed appearance. The cover extends slightly beyond the pages, with flaps on either side, and the spine is flat and broad. There are no visible illustrations or text on the cover or pages, and the book appears to be blank. The overall design is simple, practical, and utilitarian, suitable for use in a variety of urban settings such as libraries, schools, or personal study spaces.
description: An open, brown-covered book with blank, slightly yellowed pages and multiple colored tabs marking sections. The book has a realistic, well-used appearance and no visible cover illustration or text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open pages, brown cover, and colored tabs on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the pages and the protruding colored tabs.
description_view_2: Rear view of the open book, with the colored tabs more prominently visible and the cover flaps extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the colored tabs and the layered appearance of the pages.
